since_last: 41% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.81%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.08% · BTC +1.12% · Gold -0.39% · Nasdaq100 -0.10%. 41% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.81%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.81%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.88%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +15.09%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +15.09%, META +6.49%, NVDA +3.08%, UEC +1.97%, CSCO +1.56%. Laggards: RXRX -7.45%, S -5.25%, CRWD -5.13%, MDB -5.00%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.52% at $148.32
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
